dark_lace_succubus.mild: A dark, seductive flicker enters your thoughts, making you feel more mysterious and prone to alluring glances.
dark_lace_succubus.normal: The enough the mental pull is moderate and tempting. You remain yourself, but the succubus form nudges you towards allure, shadow, and a sense of dangerous charm. You may feel more comfortable in the darkness and more eager to use your beauty as a tool of temptation.
dark_lace_succubus.strong: A persistent, predatory instinct begins to dominate your thoughts, driving an irresistible compulsion to move with a lethal grace and embrace the dark, intricate allure of your new nature.
dark_lace_succubus.full: Your very essence is becoming as intricate and seductive as black lace; you find that behaving with a tempting, shadowy elegance has become your natural way of interacting with the world.
dark_lace_succubus.overwritten: The memory of any less-tempting life has been shrouded in shadows, leaving you certain that you have always been a creature of dark allure and dangerous temptation.
